matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-u-moviment-029 title: data management with no data module: gestione dati del progetto source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the data management page. test data: no data to be updated. test steps: 1. check the data management page. expected result: data management page displays no data to be updated.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-027 title: newsletter management with no emails module: newsletter activity source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the newsletter management page. test data: no emails to be added. test steps: 1. check the newsletter management page. expected result: newsletter management page displays no emails to be added.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-013 title: data management interaction module: gestione dati del progetto source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the data management page. test data: data to be updated in the postgresql database. test steps: 1. update the data in the postgresql database. 2. save the changes. expected result: data is updated successfully in the postgresql database and a confirmation message is displayed.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-011 title: newsletter management module: newsletter activity source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the newsletter management page. test data: list of emails to be added to the newsletter. test steps: 1. add a list of valid email addresses to the newsletter. 2. click the send newsletter button. expected result: newsletter is sent successfully and a confirmation message is displayed.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-028 title: newsletter management with multiple emails module: newsletter activity source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the newsletter management page. test data: multiple emails to be added. test steps: 1. add multiple valid emails to the newsletter. 2. click the send newsletter button. expected result: newsletter is sent successfully and a confirmation message is displayed.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-020 title: event viewing with valid event module: join/view event source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the event viewing page. test data: valid event id. test steps: 1. enter a valid event id. 2. click the view event button. expected result: user views the event details successfully and is redirected to the event details page.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-018 title: event joining with valid event module: join/view event source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the event joining page. test data: valid event id. test steps: 1. enter a valid event id. 2. click the join event button. expected result: user joins the event successfully and is redirected to the event details page.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-014 title: database connection failure module: gestione dati del progetto source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the data management page. test data: no specific data required. test steps: 1. attempt to connect to the postgresql database. 2. simulate a connection failure. expected result: error message displayed indicating a database connection failure.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-015 title: event creation with empty fields module: create event source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the event creation page. test data: no data entered in any fields. test steps: 1. leave all fields empty. 2. click the create event button. expected result: error message displayed indicating that all fields are required.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-030 title: data management with multiple data entries module: gestione dati del progetto source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the data management page. test data: multiple data entries to be updated. test steps: 1. update multiple data entries in the postgresql database. 2. save the changes. expected result: data is updated successfully in the postgresql database and a confirmation message is displayed.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-022 title: profile editing with valid data module: profile source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the profile editing page. test data: valid data (e.g., correct email, name, etc.). test steps: 1. enter valid data in the profile fields. 2. click the save profile button. expected result: profile is updated successfully and a confirmation message is displayed.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-006 title: flash message display module: flash activity source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on any page where flash messages can be displayed. test data: any message to be displayed. test steps: 1. trigger the display of a flash message. 2. observe the flash message on the screen. expected result: flash message is displayed correctly and disappears after a few seconds.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-019 title: event viewing with invalid event module: join/view event source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the event viewing page. test data: invalid event id. test steps: 1. enter an invalid event id. 2. click the view event button. expected result: error message displayed indicating that the event does not exist.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-021 title: profile editing with invalid data module: profile source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the profile editing page. test data: invalid data (e.g., missing required fields). test steps: 1. enter invalid data in the profile fields. 2. click the save profile button. expected result: error message displayed indicating that all fields are required.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-016 title: event creation with valid data module: create event source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the event creation page. test data: valid event name, date, and location. test steps: 1. enter a valid event name, date, and location. 2. click the create event button. expected result: event is created successfully and user is redirected to the event details page.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-001 title: user registration module: u-moviment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the registration page. test data: valid email, password, and confirm password. test steps: 1. enter a valid email address in the email field. 2. enter a valid password in the password field. 3. confirm the password in the confirm password field. 4. click the register button. expected result: user is registered successfully and redirected to the login page with a success message displayed.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-017 title: event joining with invalid event module: join/view event source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the event joining page. test data: invalid event id. test steps: 1. enter an invalid event id. 2. click the join event button. expected result: error message displayed indicating that the event does not exist.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-004 title: user login module: u-moviment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the login page. test data: valid email and password. test steps: 1. enter a valid email address in the email field. 2. enter a valid password in the password field. 3. click the login button. expected result: user is logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard with a success message displayed.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-003 title: password mismatch during registration module: u-moviment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the registration page. test data: valid email, different passwords in the password and confirm password fields. test steps: 1. enter a valid email address in the email field. 2. enter a valid password in the password field. 3. enter a different password in the confirm password field. 4. click the register button. expected result: error message displayed indicating password mismatch.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-002 title: invalid email registration module: u-moviment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the registration page. test data: invalid email (e.g., missing '@' symbol). test steps: 1. enter an invalid email address in the email field. 2. enter a valid password in the password field. 3. confirm the password in the confirm password field. 4. click the register button. expected result: error message displayed indicating an invalid email format.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-031 title: event creation with maximum length names module: create event source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the event creation page. test data: event name with maximum allowed length. test steps: 1. enter an event name with the maximum allowed length. 2. click the create event button. expected result: event is created successfully and user is redirected to the event details page.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-012 title: invalid email in newsletter management module: newsletter activity source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the newsletter management page. test data: invalid email (e.g., missing '@' symbol). test steps: 1. add an invalid email address to the newsletter. 2. click the send newsletter button. expected result: error message displayed indicating an invalid email format.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-008 title: event joining from notification module: notification center source pages: 1 preconditions: user receives a notification about an event joining. test data: no specific data required. test steps: 1. receive a notification about an event joining. 2. click on the notification to join the event. expected result: user joins the event successfully and is redirected to the event details page.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-025 title: notification center with no notifications module: notification center source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the notification center page. test data: no notifications available. test steps: 1. check the notification center page. expected result: notification center displays no notifications.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-005 title: invalid login attempt module: u-moviment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the login page. test data: invalid email or password. test steps: 1. enter an invalid email address in the email field. 2. enter a valid password in the password field. 3. click the login button. expected result: error message displayed indicating incorrect login credentials.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-024 title: exit application with saved changes module: exit source pages: 1 preconditions: user has saved changes in the application. test data: no specific data required. test steps: 1. attempt to exit the application. 2. confirm the exit prompt. expected result: application exits without prompting the user to save any unsaved changes.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-007 title: event creation from notification module: notification center source pages: 1 preconditions: user receives a notification about an event creation. test data: no specific data required. test steps: 1. receive a notification about an event creation. 2. click on the notification to create the event. expected result: event is created successfully and user is redirected to the event details page.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-009 title: profile access from notification module: notification center source pages: 1 preconditions: user receives a notification about profile access. test data: no specific data required. test steps: 1. receive a notification about profile access. 2. click on the notification to access the profile. expected result: user accesses their profile successfully and is redirected to the profile page.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-023 title: exit application with unsaved changes module: exit source pages: 1 preconditions: user has unsaved changes in the application. test data: no specific data required. test steps: 1. attempt to exit the application. 2. confirm the exit prompt. expected result: application exits and prompts the user to save any unsaved changes.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-026 title: notification center with multiple notifications module: notification center source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the notification center page. test data: multiple notifications available. test steps: 1. check the notification center page. expected result: notification center displays multiple notifications and allows the user to click on them to perform actions.

test case id: tc-u-moviment-010 title: application exit from notification module: notification center source pages: 1 preconditions: user receives a notification about application exit. test data: no specific data required. test steps: 1. receive a notification about application exit. 2. click on the notification to exit the application. expected result: application exits successfully and user is prompted to save any unsaved changes.
